HtmlBookModal.html__history: HTML was created in 1991 by Tim Berners-Lee. Over time, it evolved, and in 2014, HTML5 was introduced with support for multimedia and modern technologies.
HtmlBookModal.HtmlTags:
html - Root of an HTML document.
head - Contains metadata, styles, and scripts.
title - Sets the page title.
body - Contains the visible content.
h1-h6 - Headings of different levels.
p - Paragraph.
a - Hyperlink.
img - Image.
ul/ol - Unordered/Ordered list.
li - List item.
table - Table.
tr/td/th - Table row, cell, header.
form - User input form.
input - Input field.
button - Clickable button.
div/span - Container elements.
header/footer - Page or section header/footer.
section/article - Content sections.
nav - Navigation links.
main - Main content.
figure/figcaption - Image and caption.
video/audio - Multimedia elements.
script - JavaScript code.
link - External resource linking.
meta - Metadata definition.
HtmlBookModal.htmlatribus:
id: Unique identifier
class: Styling class
style: Inline styles
title: Tooltip
hidden: Hides element
href: Link address
src: File path
alt: Alternative text
type: Element type
placeholder: Placeholder text
required: Required field

CssBookModal.css__history: CSS was created in 1996 by Håkon Wium Lie. It was developed to separate content from design and layout. CSS3 was introduced in 1999 with new features like animations, shadows, and gradients.
CssBookModal.css__selectors: Universal selector (*), Element selector (h1), ID selector (#id), Class selector (.class), Grouping selector (h1, h2), Descendant selector (div p), Child selector (div > p), Attribute selector (a[href]), Pseudo-class selector (a:hover), Pseudo-element selector (p::first-line)
CssBookModal.css__properties:
color: Text color
font-size: Text size
font-family: Text font
font-weight: Text weight
background-color: Background color
background-image: Background image
background-size: Image size
background-position: Image position
border: Border
border-radius: Border radius
margin: Margin
padding: Padding
width: Width
height: Height
display: Display
position: Position
z-index: Z-index
float: Float
overflow: Overflow
opacity: Opacity
transition: Transition
animation: Animation

JavascriptBookModal.js__history: JavaScript was created in 1995 by Brendan Eich. Initially, it was developed to add dynamic features to web pages. Today, JavaScript is widely used for web design, dynamic content, games, applications, etc.
JavascriptBookModal.js__syntax:
Variables: var, let, const
Data types: string, number, boolean, object, array
Functions: function
Conditional statements: if, else, else if
Loops: for, while, do...while
Objects: {} (curly braces)
Arrays: [] (square brackets)
Comments: // (single-line comment), /* */ (multi-line comment)
